front: What is fermentation scale-up and what are the challenges?
back: Fermentation scale-up (shake flask → bioreactor → industrial) faces: 1) Oxygen transfer limitation, 2) Heat removal, 3) Mixing heterogeneity, 4) pH control, 5) Foam management, 6) Genetic instability at high cell density, 7) Downstream processing bottlenecks. Fed-batch is most common for peptides.
